name: Fruit Stuffed Acorn Squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the squash in half and remove seeds.
2. Place the squash cut side down in a shallow baking dish.
3. Add boiling water to the dish.
4. Cover and bake at 350 degrees for 35 to 45 minutes or until tender.
5. Turn the cut side up; set aside.
6. Combine remaining ingredients in a bowl.
7. Spoon the mixture into the squash halves.
8. Cover and bake an additional 15 minutes.
9. Makes 4 servings.
